name: libdevel-caller-perl
title: libdevel-caller-perl
description:
module providing enhanced caller() support
Devel::Caller is a Perl module that provides several useful functions for
introspecting your code deeper than the internal function "caller()" does. It
allows you to access arguments passed to a function or even retrieve the code
reference of the subroutine being invoked at the call frame indicated by the
given level.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdevel-caller-perl because module providing enhanced caller() support.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdevel-caller-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdevel-caller-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdevel-caller-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
